CustomField.description: MIS-6311 - changed the name to Product Engagement Score MIS-4723
CustomField.formula:
IF( fr_SYS_Health_Score__c = "Advisory Services or Data Feed", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0156700000A9EmJ", "Grey" , 16, 50)&"Advisory Service or Data Feed ",
IF(fr_SYS_Health_Score__c = "Critical Engagement", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFpH", "red" , 16, 50)&"Critical Engagement ",
IF( fr_SYS_Health_Score__c = "More Users Required", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xWeC", "yellow", 16, 50 )&"More Users Required " ,
IF( fr_SYS_Health_Score__c= "Good Health", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFo5", "green", 16, 50 )&"Good Health ",
IF( fr_SYS_Health_Score__c = "More Depth Required", IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0150O000004xFp7", "Blue", 16, 50 )&"More Depth Required ",
"")))))
CustomField.label: Product Engagement Score
